title: IDKAN's MCPE Stonecutter
description: My take on a modern MCPE stonecutter - also my first time doing animated textures lets celebrate !
body:
## Remember the old MCPE Stonecutter? I sorta do and I kinda miss it so I decided to kinda readd it! yeap
But since i'm a fancy panty artist myself (biggest lie ever) I decided to touch it up a bit, ~~Idk how to feel about the big saw but lalalalal cant hear you~~ **<<** Nvm I like it ignore that

![Stonecutter in inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2aac95059a4fea528c6ad184930604a9e4e190b3.png)

### This only changes the texture!! not the hitbox!! It is still a slab and resource packs cant change that!!!
Should work for older versions, haven't and NEVER will test #rebel

I will probably update, so mayb watch out for those
